name: Auth Check
shortDescription: Prints the caller's Keycloak tokens injected into the Argo pod (debug only)
description: A minimal debug node. It produces no artifacts and instead prints the Keycloak auth Argo injects into the container (KEYCLOAK_ACCESS_TOKEN, KEYCLOAK_REFRESH_TOKEN and KEYCLOAK_TOKEN_URL) to the execution logs, so you can verify the user's tokens reach the pod and how to refresh the access token. Debug/verification use only — do not leave in production pipelines since it logs secrets.

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this auth check node in the pipeline
